questions.q: A current of 5 A is flowing in a long straight wire. Find the magnetic field at a point 10 cm away from the wire. (μ₀ = 4π × 10⁻⁷ T mA⁻¹)
The magnetic field at the center of a circular coil of radius 0.5 m and carrying a current of 2 A is _______.
What is the force per unit length between two parallel wires, each carrying a current of 3 A and separated by 0.1 m? (μ₀ = 4π × 10⁻⁷ T mA⁻¹)
questions.answer: Force per unit length = μ₀I₁I₂ / 2πr = (4π × 10⁻⁷) × 3 × 3 / (2π × 0.1) = 1.8 × 10⁻⁵ N/m

questions.q: A charged particle is moving in a magnetic field. The force experienced by the particle is _______.
A long straight wire is carrying a current of 10 A. Find the magnetic field at a point 5 cm away from the wire. (μ₀ = 4π × 10⁻⁷ T mA⁻¹)
The direction of the magnetic field at the center of a circular coil carrying a current is _______.
questions.answer: Along the axis of the coil

questions.q: Two parallel wires, each carrying a current of 5 A, are separated by a distance of 0.2 m. Find the force per unit length between them. (μ₀ = 4π × 10⁻⁷ T mA⁻¹)
questions.answer: Force per unit length = μ₀I₁I₂ / 2πr = (4π × 10⁻⁷) × 5 × 5 / (2π × 0.2) = 2.5 × 10⁻⁵ N/m

questions.q: A proton is moving in a magnetic field of 2 × 10⁻⁵ T with a velocity of 10⁶ m/s. Find the force experienced by the proton.
The magnetic field at a point due to a current-carrying wire is _______.
A circular coil of 100 turns, each of radius 0.1 m, is carrying a current of 2 A. Find the magnetic field at the center of the coil. (μ₀ = 4π × 10⁻⁷ T mA⁻¹)
